RELENZA is indicated for treatment of uncomplicated acute illness due to influenza A and B virus in adults
and pediatric patients 7 years and older who have been symptomatic for no more than 2 days (see Description of
Clinical Studies and PRECAUTIONS).

1.1 Treatment of Influenza
RELENZA (zanamivir) inhalation powder is indicated for treatment of uncomplicated acute
illness due to influenza A and B virus in adults and pediatric patients aged 7 years and older who
have been symptomatic for no more than 2 days.
